scope: Internal venture-proposal claim for an agentic immune infrastructure proof artifact; not production readiness, customer traction, consciousness, or autonomous live self-modification.
summary: Dharma Swarm produced a proof artifact for agentic immune infrastructure and routed it through existing credibility, Semantic Anekanta, Bhed Gnan, TelosGatekeeper, TelicSeam Outcome, ValueEvent, Contribution, Build Protocol, and Witness Mandala pressure roles.
title: Agentic Era Immune System: internally gated proof artifact

witness_mandala.intention: Witnessing is reality contact: each role must sharpen, bound, challenge, protect, or create the next test for the claim.

evidence_required_to_upgrade: A claim-tier map separating proven, partial, hypothesis, and vision
records.next_test: Rewrite the claim as testable invariants before any stronger promotion.
records.strongest_affirmation: Agentic Era Immune System: internally gated proof artifact has a named claim packet, artifact references, and stage request.
records.strongest_objection: The claim must define exactly what would count as evidence, success, and overreach.
records.what_would_make_this_false: The claim fails if its key terms cannot be expressed as inspectable invariants or falsifiable conditions.

evidence_required_to_upgrade: A replayable command that reproduces the artifact state
records.next_test: Run the smallest deterministic proof command from a clean checkout.
records.strongest_affirmation: The claim has concrete artifacts that can be inspected by code and validators.
records.strongest_objection: A wired file path is not the same as a production runtime path.
records.what_would_make_this_false: The claim fails if referenced code, tests, state stores, or command paths do not exist or cannot be rerun.

evidence_required_to_upgrade: A red-team memo with failure modes
A rejected or narrowed claim captured in the record
A next test created from the strongest objection
records.next_test: Force the claim through one hostile reading and incorporate a narrowing correction.
records.strongest_affirmation: The claim is stronger when it survives direct pressure against inflation and circular evidence.
records.strongest_objection: The system may be rewarding its own language instead of contact with reality.
records.what_would_make_this_false: The claim fails if it depends on self-approval, vague witness records, or unsupported superiority claims.

evidence_required_to_upgrade: A willingness-to-pay interview or paid pilot signal
records.next_test: Identify one buyer and one narrow paid pilot question.
records.strongest_affirmation: Dharma Swarm produced a proof artifact for agentic immune infrastructure and routed it through existing credibility, Semantic Anekanta, Bhed Gnan, TelosGatekeeper, TelicSeam Outcome, ValueEvent, Contribution, Build Protocol, and Witness Mandala pressure roles. may become valuable if it reduces risk, time, or uncertainty for a real buyer.
records.strongest_objection: A coherent internal proof is not yet evidence of willingness to pay.
records.what_would_make_this_false: The claim fails commercially if no buyer owns the pain or pays for the reduced risk.

evidence_required_to_upgrade: Clear boundaries on what must not be centralized
records.next_test: List the harms this system prevents and the harms it could create.
records.strongest_affirmation: The claim matters if it makes powerful agentic systems more accountable and less harmful.
records.strongest_objection: A governance layer can become surveillance, gatekeeping, or institutional capture.
records.what_would_make_this_false: The claim fails if it increases control without correction, consent, or public-good accountability.

evidence_required_to_upgrade: A next question that genuinely requires human authority
records.next_test: Ask only the smallest human decision needed to advance the claim.
records.strongest_affirmation: The claim is meaningful only if it preserves purpose, human authority, and truthful memory.
records.strongest_objection: The system can overload the founder if it asks the human to hold every boundary manually.
records.what_would_make_this_false: The claim fails if it creates more cognitive burden, spiritual inflation, or vague authority.
